items.element: hooded sleep lantern as main tool
items.reason: Extremely iconic; too frequent use will make all Dream Walkers look like the same lantern guide.
Very recognizable and rare; overuse turns the whole theme into "moth mage" instead of Dream Walker.
Strong magical prop; should feel special, not standard equipment.
Legendary surreal image; loses impact if repeated often.
Very villainous and iconic; can overpower gentler dream variants.
Core motif, but easy to overuse as the default necklace on every character.
Useful baseline, but too many moons flatten the theme into generic lunar magic.
Strong visual signature; use only when variant supports moth / fey / strange dream imagery.
Very obvious dream effect; frequent use makes portraits look samey and too magical.
Distinct oracle motif; avoid repeating across multiple seeds in a row.
Dark variant cue; too frequent use shifts the whole theme into warlock / curse territory.
Companions should remain rare because the generator layer says companion is rare.
Very memorable and cute; repeated use becomes distracting.
Good scholar cue, but too frequent use overlaps Rune Scholar.
Can make the theme too arcane and rune-heavy; use carefully before Rune Scholar theme.
Elegant but can quickly make every character look like the same oracle archetype.
Strong and useful baseline, but should rotate with pale thread, blanket wraps, beads, herbs.
Excellent guardian cue; too frequent use narrows martial Dream Walkers into one archetype.
Safe fantasy FX, but common overuse makes compositions generic.
Familiar fantasy cliché; should appear rarely and only when fey variant is selected.
Extremely high-impact mood; should be reserved for nightmare, legendary, or boss-like seeds.
Strong symbolic prop; overuse makes many characters feel theatrical in the same way.
Good ritual motif, but too many bells can clutter silhouettes.
Rare magical material; use as accent, not default finish.

integrationNotes.scenePropPolicy: Use scene props only under existing environmentDetailLevel caps; prefer character-bound details.
integrationNotes.antiRepeatPolicy: Import anti_repetition_notes as cooldown hints, especially iconic lantern/moth/dreamglass/sleep-sand elements.
